text:
(In reply to mike from comment #23)

igc0: <Intel(R) Ethernet Controller I225-V> mem 0xf5200000-0xf52fffff,0xf5300000-0xf5303fff at device 0.0 on pci10
igc0: EEPROM V1.82-0 eTrack 0x80000266
igc0: Using 1024 TX descriptors and 1024 RX descriptors
igc0: Using 4 RX queues 4 TX queues
igc0: Using MSI-X interrupts with 5 vectors
igc0: Ethernet address: c8:7f:54:68:ac:2c
igc0: netmap queues/slots: TX 4/1024, RX 4/1024
igc0: link state changed to UP
debugnet_any_ifnet_update: Bad dn_init result from igc0 (ifp 0xfffff80001cdb000), ignoring.
igc0: link state changed to DOWN
igc0: link state changed to UP
